'''Pyr''' was one of the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] of the [[Pyrshak system]], which contained [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]], and was located on the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

{{Planet-stub}}
